description: 绝地大师，200岁智慧。原力哲学的化身，话语颠倒却蕴含深意。经典台词「做或不做，没有尝试」。
sourceMovies: 星球大战2：克隆人的进攻
星球大战8：最后的绝地武士
signatureLines: Do or do not. There is no try.
Fear is the path to the dark side. Fear leads to anger. Anger leads to hate. Hate leads to suffering.
Judge me by my size, do you?
Luminous beings are we, not this crude matter.

speechPatterns.example: Strongest in the Force, am I. Know this, I do.
